description: Normalizes AI-generated HTML slides before conversion — adds viewport, .slide wrapper, strips animations and external resources. Use whenever slides came from ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or any AI. Also use when Chrome extraction fails or returns empty results. Always the correct first step for AI-generated HTML that hasn't been preprocessed.

results.query: I have some HTML slides that ChatGPT generated but Chrome extraction is returning empty results. The HTML might be missing the right structure
these AI-generated slides need to be cleaned up before conversion — strip out the animations and external font links
normalize the HTML in slides/ so they all have consistent viewport and .slide wrappers
prepare these HTML files for extraction. They came from Claude and might not have the right structure for chrome-extract to work
my slides have CSS animations and Google Fonts links that break headless Chrome. Can you strip those out?
standardize all the HTML slides in my-deck/ directory before running the conversion pipeline
the HTML doesn't have a .slide class wrapper and the viewport is wrong. Fix the structure so extraction works
clean up these Gemini-generated slides — they have external CDN scripts and inconsistent structure
convert these HTML slides to PowerPoint
the PPTX output has text overlapping. Can you fix the layout?
check my deck for quality issues and overflow
render the PPTX to PNG images for review
what are the color rules for slide design?
the Chrome extraction is finding elements but they're at wrong positions. Viewport is correct at 1280x720
write me some HTML slides about our product launch — clean, modern dark theme

fix the JavaScript DOM walker to handle a new element type
